channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Running a marathon a day in 2024, she has a world record within her grasp
item.description: Belgian ultra runner Hilde Dosogne feels she has done all it takes to become the first woman to run a marathon every single day of the year.
item.dc:creator: Raf Casert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jared Goff, the NFL’s castoff quarterback, returns home to Bay Area, cements career revival by dominating 49ers
item.description: The Novato native, an alum of Marin Catholic and Cal, continues to shine as one of the NFL's best quarterbacks for the Detroit Lions.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: 6 former Florida State basketball players sue legendary coach over unpaid NIL compensation
item.description: Six former Florida State basketball players are suing longtime Seminoles head coach Leonard Hamilton over unpaid NIL compensation that totals $1.5 million
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lions beat the 49ers 40-34 in a tune-up for Week 18 division showdown
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The big prizes for the Detroit Lions remain on the horizon, with the team seeking a division title, the top seed in the NFC playoffs and the franchise's first Super Bowl trip.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brock Purdy's elbow was 'on fire' after hit but he says his surgically repaired ligament is fine
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Brock Purdy hurt his surgically repaired throwing elbow late in a loss to the Detroit Lions on Monday night, the latest blow in an injury-plagued season for the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Warriors bludgeoned by Cavaliers to enter New Year
item.description: The Warriors looked like they were nowhere close to being in the same league as the first-place Cavaliers.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Detroit Lions knock off 49ers ahead of winner-take-all battle next week
item.description: The Detroit Lions knocked off the San Francisco 49ers on Monday night ahead of a winner-take-all battle against the Vikings next week.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: The Jets are a lost franchise
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are a lost franchise. When do you realize what you do is not working? You have not made the playoffs since 2010. The Jets, who have already begun interviewing GM candidates, will now interview head coaching candidates without having hired a GM.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: The upperclassmen: Oregon, Ohio St. leaned on well-traveled veteran QBs to reach Rose Bowl, CFP
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Oregon and Ohio State are two of the most daunting teams left in the College Football Playoff in no small part because they've both got starting quarterbacks who had already seen — and beaten — just about everything they're ever going to face at this level of the sport before they
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A jet carrying the Gonzaga men's basketball team ordered to stop to avoid collision at LAX
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration has launched an investigation after a private jet carrying the Gonzaga University men’s basketball team nearly crossed a runway as another flight was taking off at Los Angeles International Airport.
item.dc:creator: Stefanie Dazio And Jaimie Ding, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bucs with Bowles thanks a near-perfect offensive day, and a duck, for the team's return to first place
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned to the top of the NFC South on Sunday with a dominating 48-14 win over the Carolina Panthers, paired with a loss by the Atlanta Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Texas' Arch Manning shoots down transfer rumors ahead of CFP game
item.description: Texas Longhorns quarterback Arch Manning shot down rumors he planned on entering the transfer portal once the 2024-25 season was finished.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FBI warns South American crime groups targeting star athletes in burglaries: report
item.description: The robberies of the homes of some of the most famous athletes in the U.S., including Travis Kelce and Patrick Mahomes, are reportedly led by South American crime groups.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Auriemma ties VanDerveer for most appearances at one school in women's AP Top 25; UCLA remains No. 1
item.description: UConn coach Geno Auriemma moved into a tie with Tara VanDerveer for the most appearances with one school in the women’s basketball AP Top 25 as the Huskies remained seventh in the poll Monday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears wrap up trying 2024 season vs. Packers on Sunday at noon in Green Bay
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the ball left the hand of Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels with no time left on the clock on Oct. 27 in Washington, the Bears were 4-2 and just needed to swat the ball to the ground to finish off their fourth straight win. Instead, the ball was batted into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: JuJu Watkins scores 31 points to propel No. 4 Southern California past No. 23 Michigan 78-58
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins scored 31 points, making 13 of 14 free throws, and No. 4 Southern California beat No. 23 Michigan 78-58 on Sunday night in the Trojans’ Big Ten home opener. Watkins had five rebounds, seven assists, three steals and three blocks.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels dazzles again as Commanders clinch a playoff spot by beating Falcons 30-24 in OT
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — Jayden Daniels felt tired. Tired from a game that went well past 60 minutes. Tired from running all over the field for the better part of three-plus hours. It was all worth it after carrying the Washington Commanders into the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2024 Holiday Bowl: Homegrown Cougars leave it all on the field in front of hometown crowd
item.description: While a depleted Washington State may not have tasted any eggnog this year in the Holiday Bowl after falling short to Syracuse 52-35, a few San Diego locals still making a memory of a lifetime playing on the big stage in front of their hometown crowd.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Darnold gives Vikings another gem with career-high 377 yards in 27-25 win over Packers
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings were ready to start their postgame ritual in honor of a ninth consecutive victory before realizing Sam Darnold was still missing from the raucous locker room because he was finishing his interview with the TV broadcasting crew.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Moment of silence for former President Jimmy Carter held before the Falcons-Commanders game
item.description: Jimmy Carter was honored with a moment of silence before the Atlanta Falcons’ game at the Washington Commanders on Sunday night, hours after the 39th president of the United States died at the age of 100 in Plains, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: USU beats San Diego State on last-second shot, 67-66
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men’s basketball earned its first road win over a ranked opponent in over three decades Saturday afternoon in front of a sellout crowd at Viejas Arena, taking down No. 20 San Diego State 67-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lehkonen gets hat trick as Colorado beats Utah, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's struggles on its home ice continue. Artturi Lehkonen scored his first NHL hat trick, and the Colorado Avalanche won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center in Salt Lake City on Friday. Utah lost all three games on this current homestand.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Southern California overcomes 17-point deficit to beat Texas A&M 35-31 in Las Vegas Bowl
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Southern California Trojans ended their season the way they started it. On Sept. 1 at Allegiant Stadium in the opener, the Trojans overcame a third-quarter deficit and scored with eight seconds left to beat LSU 27-20.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Cathedral Catholic goalie shows why she's a keeper; honors her coach through art
item.description: Cathedral Catholic's 4-year starting goalie Maria'O Brien expresses her love to her head soccer coach through art. Suprising and touching longtime Cathedral Coach Dawn Lee.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field advantage throughout the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU arrives in San Antonio ahead of Alamo Bowl
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The Cougars have arrived in San Antonio for what they hope will be an Alamo Bowl to remember. "Super excited to be down here," said defensive end Tyler Batty.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Breaking: Dave Fleming leaves CMU after 20 years
item.description: "I thank Coach Fleming for all his dedication and hard work at CMU," Colorado Mesa Athletic Director Joan McDermott said in a press release. "He is not only a great coach, but a special person and will be greatly missed.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kiser, KREX 5
